title: Hide admin login shortcut from public website

requirements.summary: Remove visible admin login shortcut from public-facing website while keeping /admin route functional
acceptanceCriteria: No link, button, or text directing users to '/admin' or the admin login page is visible anywhere on the public-facing website (homepage, navigation bar, footer, etc.).
Navigating directly to '/admin' via the browser address bar still works and shows the admin login page.
The admin dashboard remains fully functional for authenticated admins.
No other navigation links or public content are affected by this change.

file_operations.description: Remove any visible link, button, or navigation item that directs to '/admin' or the admin login page. Ensure the navigation bar only shows public-facing links (Home, About, Services, Contact) and customer authentication controls. Do not modify the router configuration or the /admin route itself.

Review and remove any visible shortcuts, links, or buttons in the hero section, footer, or any other area that directs users to '/admin' or the admin login page. Ensure no admin-related navigation elements are exposed to public visitors.
